name: kemyan-store-management
description: KEMYAN IMS-compliant store management system — a TypeScript modular monolith for chemical inventory, procurement, and feed traceability

scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/backend && npm run test -w apps/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/backend && npm run lint -w apps/frontend
